features.description1: With NinjaCard's NFC digital business card, sharing your contacts is seamless. Just tap your NinjaCard NFC card to another NFC-enabled device, and your digital profile will be shared instantly.
features.description2: Each NinjaCard NFC digital business card has a powerful tool for generating new contacts via the 'Swap Contacts' button. This feature allows you to easily capture new contacts, making it the perfect tool for expanding your network.
features.mainHeader3: Update Your Information in Real Time
features.description3: With NinjaCard, you can update your contact information at any time, ensuring that your network always has the most up-to-date information. Just tap your phone to share the updated profile instantly.
features.description4: The Ninja card offers the ability to download a QR code for your smart business card, allowing easy sharing and accessibility of your information. This feature streamlines the process of clients and users accessing your information and provides a seamless user experience.
features.description5: Your smart business card profile offers customization options that allow you to change colors. This flexibility ensures that your business card reflects your brand identity and stands out from the rest. With Ninja Card, you can create a unique and professional profile for your business card.
features.description6:
Track the performance of your NinjaCard in real time! Get detailed statistics on profile visits, contact downloads, and client engagement.
See how many people have viewed your profile, downloaded your contacts, or clicked on your social media links. With NinjaCard's analytics, you're always informed and can improve the effectiveness of your digital business card.

items.question: What is a digital profile?
items.answer: A digital profile is a modern way to share your data and contacts easily, quickly, and without physical business cards. With NinjaCard, you share your profile via NFC, QR code, or link, which can be updated at any time.

items.question: How do I share my profile?
items.answer: You can share your digital profile with one tap using NFC, scan a QR code, use the share button, or Google Wallet. Just choose the most convenient method!

items.question: Can I personalize my profile?
items.answer: Yes! You can personalize your digital profile with your logo, color scheme, social links, and other data you wish to share.

items.question: How do I update my profile information?
items.answer: You can easily update your information through our online platform. Any changes are reflected instantly, and you can share them with one tap.

items.question: How secure is my data?
items.answer: Your data is stored in a secure environment. The NFC card does not store any data-it simply triggers a redirect to a secure URL where your information is safely hosted.

items.question: What features does the Pro plan offer?
items.answer: The Pro plan includes advanced features like lead generation, detailed profile visit statistics, and priority support. It's perfect for professionals looking to optimize their networking.

items.question: How do I start with the Pro plan?
items.answer: You can start with a 30-day free trial of the Pro plan. After that, you'll have access to all the advanced features to help you expand your network and analyze engagement.

items.question: Does the digital profile work on all devices?
items.answer: Yes! The digital profile is fully compatible with all modern smartphones that support NFC or QR code scanning. You can share your profile anywhere, with any device.

items.question: How can I contact support?
items.answer: You can reach out to us via email or through the contact form on the website. Our team is available to answer your questions and assist with any issues.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy aims to inform you how "Ninja Card" ltd processes personal data through the website https://www.ninjacardsnfc.com/, and what your rights are.

admin.title: Data Controller:
admin.content:
"Ninja Card" ltd
UIC: 208374055
Republic of Bulgaria
The company is not required to appoint a Data Protection Officer pursuant to Art. 37 of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).

dataCollected.title: Categories of Personal Data:
items: Photo or logo for NFC business card
Potential client data submitted via forms
Technical data (IP address, device, access logs)

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing:
legalBasis.content: Personal data is processed on the basis of Art. 6(1) GDPR: consent (point a), performance of a contract (point b), and legitimate interests of the Company (point f).

purpose.title: Purposes and Legal Bases for Processing:
items: Responding to inquiries – performance of a contract or legitimate interest
Order fulfillment – performance of a contract

storage.title: Data Retention:
storage.content: Data submitted via contact forms is retained for up to 12 months. Customer data is retained in accordance with accounting and tax legislation. Data used for marketing purposes is retained until consent is withdrawn.

recipients.title: Data Recipients:
recipients.content: Personal data may be shared only with technical and logistical partners (e.g. hosting providers and courier companies), to the extent necessary for providing the service. Data is not shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

rights.title: Your Rights:
items: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")
Right to withdraw consent at any time
Right to lodge a complaint with the CPDP (www.cpdp.bg)

contact.title: Contact:
contact.content: For questions regarding this Privacy Policy or the processing of your personal data, please contact us at: ninjacardnfc@gmail.com

sections.title: Orders and Delivery:

sections.title: Alternative Dispute Resolution:

sections.title: Governing Law:

LayoutFAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
LayoutFAQ.subtitle: Clear answers about Ninja Card and the digital profile.

one.question: What do I actually get?
one.answer: You get a digital contact profile that you can share in multiple ways. The NFC card is included as a convenient sharing tool.

two.question: How do I share my profile?
two.answer: You can share it using an NFC card, QR code, share button or link. It works in any situation.

three.question: Does it work on all phones?
three.answer: Yes. NFC works on most modern smartphones, while the QR code and link work on all devices.

four.question: Can I update my information?
four.answer: Yes. You edit your profile online and changes are applied instantly, without needing a new card.

five.question: How does the subscription work?
five.answer: The subscription is for the digital profile. You can start with a 30-day free trial and cancel anytime.

shogun.title: SHOGUN
shogun.tagline: For teams: centralized control + profile management.

header.subtitle: A clear comparison between Shinobi, Samurai and Shogun.

one.question: Which plan is best for an individual professional?
one.answer: If you simply want to share your contact professionally, Shinobi is enough. If you want to collect leads and track real interest after meetings and events, Samurai is the smarter choice.

two.question: What is the main difference between Shinobi and Samurai?
two.answer: Shinobi lets you share your profile. Samurai lets you collect contacts through a form and track analytics. That’s the difference between “I shared my details” and “I captured leads.”

three.question: Why is Samurai the most popular plan?
three.answer: Because it adds real business value: lead capture, deeper analytics, and branding. Most users want results from networking - not just a digital card.

four.question: When should I choose Shogun?
four.answer: When you have a team and need centralized control. Shogun supports up to 100 profiles with admin management, roles, and team-level analytics.

five.question: Can I start with a lower plan and upgrade later?
five.answer: Yes. Your profile stays the same - additional features simply unlock when you upgrade. No need to rebuild anything.

six.question: Is the NFC card included in all paid plans?
six.answer: Yes. Shinobi, Samurai and Shogun include an NFC card. The difference lies in the software features and level of control.

seven.question: What does the Free Trial include?
seven.answer: The Free Trial allows you to create a digital profile and test sharing via link and QR code, so you can experience the system before choosing a plan.

eight.question: What if my company team has more than 10 members?
eight.answer: Contact us. Shogun covers up to 100 profiles, but we can create a tailored solution based on your team size and needs.

SuccessPage.videoTitle: How to set up your profile in 2 minutes
SuccessPage.informationText:
What happens next?

1. Add the contact information you want to share – phone number, email, social media links and more.
2. Your profile becomes active instantly and is ready to use.
3. If you selected a personalized card, our team will contact you to prepare a custom design and receive your final approval.
4. After confirmation, your card will be produced and shipped within 1–3 business days.

Once you receive it, you will be able to share professionally – via your NFC card or your personal QR code.

changelog.title: New Features
changelog.description: Everything new in Ninja Card — features, improvements and AI integrations.

v25.label: AI Edition
v25.highlight: Artificial intelligence comes to Ninja Card
changes: AI Bio Generator — generates 3 bio variants in BG and EN with profile analysis
AI Profile Optimizer — analyzes the profile and gives specific recommendations with a 0-100 score
AI Follow-up Generator — generates a personalized email after receiving a lead with 1 click
AI Lead Qualifier — automatically categorizes leads (🔥 Hot / 🟡 Warm / ❄️ Cold)
AI Weekly Digest — personalized weekly email report with AI analysis
AI A/B Tester — generates variants for position and bio with visual before/after preview
Video Bio — video presentation directly on the card with play/pause overlay
Bio section — text presentation with 'Read more' on the card
Location map — automatically shows the branch address
Send Email button — opens the email client with a pre-filled message
Google Wallet — customize background with preset themes and custom color
Changelog page — history of all versions and changes
Redesigned Video Upload page
Redesigned Google Wallet page with live preview
BG/EN localization of the Google Wallet card

v24.label: HubSpot & Analytics
changes: HubSpot integration — sync leads directly to HubSpot CRM
Bulk sync — sync all leads with one click
Premium Excel export — .xlsx with Summary BI sheet, KPI cards and conversion rate
Monthly filter — analyze leads and visits by period
Server-side pagination — 1700+ employees without lag
Admin users panel — new design with search, sort and action buttons

v23.label: Profile & Leads
v23.highlight: New profile design and lead management
changes: New leads page design — dark, amber accent, search and sort
Delete account — full deletion with cascading cleanup of all data
Card theme system — customizable colors with JSON theme engine
Cover image — upload and crop a card cover image
isDirect mode — automatic VCF download on scan
CSV export of leads

v22.label: Dashboard
changes: Dashboard with visits, downloads, shares and clicks
DashboardEvent model — event-based tracking for accurate analytics
Admin overview — analysis of all 1700+ users
Conversion rate calculator — leads / visits
Regional analytics in Excel export

v21.label: Leads System
v21.highlight: System for collecting and managing leads
changes: Lead form on the card — collects contact data from visitors
Subscribed model — lead database with GDPR consent
Notifications for new leads
Message modal — view messages from leads

hero.title: Conversion Foundation
hero.descriptionPrefix: A separate internal concept page for the new profile flow with less noise, 3 strong CTAs, event tracking, lead source tracking and a follow-up cadence of

blocks.hero: Hero with 1 headline, 1 proof point and 3 clear CTAs
blocks.trustBar: Trust bar: license, certificates, reviews, brands
blocks.booking: Booking block with specific meeting types
blocks.magnet: Lead magnet section with gated resource
blocks.proof: Soft proof: recent wins, case snippets, social proof

ctaSection.title: Every visit should lead to action

booking.title: Book a meeting
booking.subtitle: The fastest path from tap to conversation
booking.detail: of clicks lead to a booked consultation

inquiry.title: Send an inquiry
inquiry.subtitle: For people who are not ready for a call yet
inquiry.detail: leave a question or a specific need

resource.title: Get a resource
resource.subtitle: Gated checklist, calculator or guide
resource.detail: enter the funnel through a lead magnet

tracking.title: What we measure from day one

framework.ctaCtr: CTR by CTA and by source
framework.scrollDepth: Scroll depth to the booking section

sources.title: Every lead must have an origin

qrBackside.note: A strong fallback for mobile friction

expoEvent.note: This deserves a dedicated campaign mode

referralPartner.note: A good base for a referral engine

followUp.title: Automated cadence: 2 hours -> 24 hours -> 7 days
followUp.description: This builds on the AI follow-up pieces that already exist in the project and evolves them from a single follow-up into a full conversion flow.
followUp.backendTitle: How the backend flow should work

backend.skipRules: skip if there is a reply or a booked meeting
backend.sourceTone: per-source tone: NFC / event / referral / LinkedIn

twoHours.title: Fresh memory follow-up
twoHours.purpose: While the person still remembers the interaction and the conversation.
twoHours.message: A short, warm follow-up with context from the meeting and a soft CTA for a quick call or reply.

twentyFourHours.title: Value follow-up
twentyFourHours.purpose: If there is no reaction yet, we send value instead of just another reminder.
twentyFourHours.message: Send a useful resource: checklist, mini guide, calculator or case-driven explanation based on the lead's need.

sevenDays.title: Reactivation follow-up
sevenDays.purpose: Brings colder leads back into the conversation without sounding desperate.
sevenDays.message: A short re-open message with one concrete offer: a meeting, second opinion or a new resource.
